contacts.name: Rajesh Kumar
contacts.note: Primary contact for all OT system incidents. Carries pager during off-hours.

contacts.name: Priya Sharma
contacts.availability: Business hours (09:00–18:00 IST); emergency line available
contacts.note: Coordinates IT and OT security response. Liaises with CERT-IN for critical incidents.

contacts.name: Suresh Nair
contacts.availability: Business hours; available via emergency line 24x7
contacts.note: Final authority for production shutdown decisions. Must be notified for all CRITICAL incidents.

contacts.name: CERT-IN Incident Response Helpdesk
contacts.note: Indian Computer Emergency Response Team. Mandatory reporting for critical infrastructure incidents under IT Act 2000 Section 70B. Report within 6 hours of detection.

contacts.name: DSCI Cyber Emergency
contacts.note: Data Security Council of India. Consult for data-breach aspects of OT incidents involving personal data of employees or customers.

LOW.response_time_sla: Review within next shift handover (≤8 hours)
actions: Log the incident with full details
Review during next shift briefing
Document in shift handover report

MEDIUM.response_time_sla: Acknowledge within 1 hour; resolve or escalate within 4 hours
actions: Notify OT Engineer On-Call via phone
Investigate and document root cause
Apply temporary mitigation if available
Escalate to Security Lead if not resolved within 4 hours

HIGH.response_time_sla: Acknowledge within 30 minutes; initiate response within 1 hour
actions: Immediately notify OT Engineer and Security Lead
Isolate affected asset from OT network if safe to do so
Preserve all logs and network traffic captures
Begin formal incident investigation
Escalate to Plant Manager if production is impacted

CRITICAL.response_time_sla: Immediate response — do not wait; notify within 15 minutes
actions: Immediately notify all contacts — do not delay
Convene emergency response team (physical or bridge call)
Consider controlled shutdown only after OT engineer assessment
Report to CERT-IN within 6 hours (mandatory under IT Act 2000)
Activate out-of-band communication channel for coordination
Preserve forensic evidence — do not reboot systems without approval
Initiate OT-specific incident response playbook
Document timeline of events for regulatory submission

cert_in.mandatory_for: Critical information infrastructure incidents, ransomware, data breaches
cert_in.legal_basis: Information Technology Act 2000, Section 70B; CERT-In Directions April 2022

dsci.mandatory_for: Incidents involving personal data of Indian residents
